_README: SAMPLE / DEMO crosswalk slice. This is NOT the full official mapping. For real use, replace `mappings` with the official CMS PY2026 CMS-HCC V28 ICD-10-to-HCC crosswalk downloaded from https://www.cms.gov/medicare/payment/medicare-advantage-rates-statistics/risk-adjustment/2026-model-software-icd-10-mappings . HCC category numbers in this sample are illustrative for the demo and MUST be verified against the official CMS file before any real interpretation. The tool reads whatever is in `mappings`, so swapping in the official file changes nothing in the code.
source: Replace with official CMS PY2026 V28 ICD-10 mapping file. Sample numbers are illustrative only.

mappings.hcc_label: Not HCC-mapped at unspecified stage 3 (verify in V28)

mappings.desc: Major depressive disorder, single episode, mild
mappings.hcc_label: Not HCC-mapped in V28 (mild depression removed)

mappings.desc: Personal history of malignant neoplasm of breast
mappings.hcc_label: History-of code; does not map (no RAF weight)
